skills.name: Team Rocket’s Hypnotizer
skills.text: If the Team Rocket’s Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Team Rocket’s Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Asleep.

skills.name: Survival Brace
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has full HP and would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, it is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10. Then, discard this card.

skills.name: Lucky Helmet
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), draw 2 cards.

skills.name: Rescue Board
skills.text: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is {C} less. If that Pokémon’s remaining HP is 30 or less, it has no Retreat Cost.

skills.name: Maximum Belt
skills.text: Attacks used by the Pokémon this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Hero’s Cape
skills.text: The Pokémon this card is attached to gets +100 HP.

skills.name: Heavy Baton
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has a Retreat Cost of exactly 4, is in the Active Spot, and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, move up to 3 Basic Energy cards from that Pokémon to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

skills.name: Handheld Fan
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), move an Energy from the Attacking Pokémon to 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

skills.name: Binding Mochi
skills.text: Attacks used by the Poisoned Pokémon this card is attached to do 40 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Powerglass
skills.text: At the end of your turn (after your attack), if the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, you may attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to it.

skills.name: Payapa Berry
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s {P} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

skills.name: Sparkling Crystal
skills.text: When the Tera Pokémon this card is attached to uses an attack, that attack costs 1 Energy less. (The Energy can be of any type.)

skills.name: Gravity Gemstone
skills.text: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot, the Retreat Cost of both Active Pokémon is {C} more.

skills.name: Deluxe Bomb
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 12 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon. If you placed any damage counters in this way, discard this card.

skills.name: Counter Gain
skills.text: If you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent, attacks used by the Pokémon this card is attached to cost {C} less.

skills.name: Amulet of Hope
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Haban Berry
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s {N} Pokémon, it takes 60 less damage (after applying Weakness and Resistance), and discard this card.

skills.name: Hop’s Choice Band
skills.text: Attacks used by the Hop’s Pokémon this card is attached to cost {C} less and do 30 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Lillie’s Pearl
skills.text: If the Lillie’s Pokémon this card is attached to is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, that player takes 1 fewer Prize card.

skills.name: Cynthia's Power Weight
skills.text: The Cynthia’s Pokémon this card is attached to gets +70 HP.

skills.name: Air Balloon
skills.text: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is {C}{C} less.

skills.name: Brave Bangle
skills.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to doesn’t have a Rule Box, the attacks it uses do 30 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} (before applying Weakness and Resistance). (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

skills.name: Punk Helmet
skills.text: If the {D} Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 4 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

skills.name: Sacred Charm
skills.text: The Pokémon this card is attached to takes 30 less damage from attacks from your opponent’s Pokémon that have an Ability (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Light Ball
skills.text: Attacks used by the Pikachu {ex} this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Thick Scale
skills.text: The {N} Pokémon this card is attached to takes 50 less damage from attacks from your opponent’s {G}, {R}, {W}, or {L} Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Core Memory
skills.text: The Mega Zygarde {ex} this card is attached to can use the attack on this card. (You still need the necessary Energy to use this attack.)

skills.name: Billy & O'Nare
skills.text: Draw 2 cards. Then, if you have 10 or more cards in your hand, draw 2 more cards.

skills.name: Boss’s Orders
skills.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

skills.name: Perrin
skills.text: Reveal up to 2 Pokémon in your hand and put them into your deck. If you do, search your deck for up to that many Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Lana’s Aid
skills.text: Put up to 3 in any combination of Pokémon that don’t have a Rule Box and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

skills.name: Explorer’s Guidance
skills.text: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and put 2 of them into your hand. Discard the other cards.

skills.name: Eri
skills.text: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you discard up to 2 Item cards you find there.

skills.name: Morty’s Conviction
skills.text:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw a card for each of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon.

skills.name: Ciphermaniac’s Codebreaking
skills.text: Search your deck for 2 cards, shuffle your deck, then put those cards on top of it in any order.

skills.name: Salvatore
skills.text: Search your deck for a card that has no Abilities and evolves from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. You can use this card on a Pokémon you put down when you were setting up to play or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

skills.name: Bianca’s Devotion
skills.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Pokémon that has 30 HP or less remaining.

skills.name: Kieran
skills.text:
Choose 1:

• Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
• During this turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} and Active Pokémon {V} (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Carmine
skills.text:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

skills.name: Hassel
skills.text:
You can use this card only if any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent’s last turn.

Look at the top 8 cards of your deck and put up to 3 of them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

skills.name: Colress’s Tenacity
skills.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Janine’s Secret Art
skills.text: Choose up to 2 of your {D} Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a Basic {D} Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you attached Energy to your Active Pokémon in this way, it is now Poisoned.

skills.name: Cassiopeia
skills.text:
You can use this card only when it is the last card in your hand.

Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Xerosic’s Machinations
skills.text: Your opponent discards cards from their hand until they have 3 cards in their hand.

skills.name: Crispin
skills.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards of different types, reveal them, and put 1 of them into your hand. Attach the other to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Lacey
skills.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 4 cards. If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

skills.name: Kofu
skills.text: Put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you put 2 cards on the bottom of your deck in this way, draw 4 cards. (If you can’t put 2 cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck, you can’t use this card.)

skills.name: Briar
skills.text:
You can use this card only if your opponent has exactly 2 Prize cards remaining.

During this turn, if your opponent’s Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your Tera Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

skills.name: Drayton
skills.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon and a Trainer card you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

skills.name: Surfer
skills.text: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

skills.name: Lisia’s Appeal
skills.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, the new Active Pokémon is now Confused.

skills.name: Cyrano
skills.text: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon {ex}, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Larry’s Skill
skills.text: Discard your hand and search your deck for a Pokémon, a Supporter card, and a Basic Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Amarys
skills.text: Draw 4 cards. At the end of this turn, if you have 5 or more cards in your hand, discard your hand.

skills.name: Iris’s Fighting Spirit
skills.text:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

skills.name: Ruffian
skills.text: Discard a Pokémon Tool and a Special Energy from 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

skills.name: Brock’s Scouting
skills.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon or 1 Evolution Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Black Belt’s Training
skills.text: During this turn, attacks used by your Pokémon do 40 more damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon {ex} (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Cook
skills.text: Heal 70 damage from your Active Pokémon.

skills.name: Judge
skills.text: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

skills.name: Emcee's Hype
skills.text: Draw 2 cards. If your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining, draw 2 more cards.

skills.name: Ethan's Adventure
skills.text: Search your deck for up to 3 in any combination of Ethan’s Pokémon and Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Ariana
skills.text: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket’s Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Archer
skills.text:
You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket’s Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent’s last turn.

Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Giovanni
skills.text: Switch your Active Team Rocket’s Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket’s Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Petrel
skills.text: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Proton
skills.text:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Team Rocket’s Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: N's Plan
skills.text: Move up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

skills.name: Fennel
skills.text: Heal 40 damage from each of your Pokémon.

skills.name: Harlequin
skills.text: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards. If tails, you draw 3 cards, and your opponent draws 5 cards.

skills.name: Cheren
skills.text: Draw 3 cards.

skills.name: Hilda
skills.text: Search your deck for an Evolution Pokémon and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Lt. Surge's Bargain
skills.text: Ask your opponent if each player may take a Prize card. If yes, each player takes a Prize card. If no, you draw 4 cards.

skills.name: Lillie's Determination
skills.text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

skills.name: Acerola's Mischief
skills.text:
You can use this card only if your opponent has 2 or fewer Prize cards remaining.

Choose 1 of your Pokémon in play. During your opponent’s next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to that Pokémon by your opponent’s Pokémon {ex}.

skills.name: Wally's Compassion
skills.text: Heal all damage from 1 of your Mega Evolution Pokémon {ex}. If you healed any damage in this way, put all Energy attached to that Pokémon into your hand.

skills.name: Grimsley's Move
skills.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck and put a {D} Pokémon you find there onto your Bench. Shuffle the other cards and put them on the bottom of your deck. You can’t use this card during your first turn.

skills.name: Dawn
skills.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, a Stage 1 Pokémon, and a Stage 2 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Firebreather
skills.text: Search your deck for up to 7 Basic {R} Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Canari
skills.text:
You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand.

Search your deck for up to 4 {L} Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

skills.name: Anthea & Concordia
skills.text:
You can use this card only if you have N’s Darmanitan, N’s Zoroark {ex}, N’s Vanilluxe, N’s Klinklang, N’s Reshiram, and N’s Zekrom in play.

During this turn, if your opponent’s Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by your N’s Pokémon, take 3 more Prize cards.

skills.name: Waitress
skills.text: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a Basic Energy card you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

skills.name: Urbain
skills.text: Draw 3 cards.

skills.name: Lucian
skills.text: Each player shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If either player put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, each player flips a coin. If heads, that player draws 6 cards. If tails, they draw 3 cards.

skills.name: Tarragon
skills.text: Put up to 4 in any combination of {F} Pokémon and Basic {F} Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

skills.name: Naveen
skills.text: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. Before drawing cards, you may discard any number of cards from your hand. (If you can’t draw any cards in this way, you can’t use this card.)

skills.name: Rosa's Encouragement
skills.text:
You can use this card only if you have more Prize cards remaining than your opponent.

Attach up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Stage 2 Pokémon.

skills.name: Jacinthe
skills.text: Heal 150 damage from 1 of your {P} Pokémon.

skills.name: Community Center
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, if they played a Supporter card from their hand this turn, they may heal 10 damage from each of their Pokémon.

skills.name: Perilous Jungle
skills.text: During Pokémon Checkup, put 2 more damage counters on each Poisoned non-{D} Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).

skills.name: Full Metal Lab
skills.text: {M} Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) take 30 less damage from attacks from the opponent’s Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Festival Grounds
skills.text: Each Pokémon that has any Energy attached (both yours and your opponent’s) recovers from all Special Conditions and can’t be affected by any Special Conditions.

skills.name: Jamming Tower
skills.text: Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) have no effect.

skills.name: Neutralization Zone
skills.text:
Prevent all damage done to Pokémon that don’t have a Rule Box (both yours and your opponent’s) by attacks from the opponent’s Pokémon {ex} and Pokémon {V}. (Pokémon {ex}, Pokémon {V}, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

This card can’t be put into your hand or deck from the discard pile.

skills.name: Academy at Night
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may put a card from their hand on top of their deck.

skills.name: Grand Tree
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may search their deck for a Stage 1 Pokémon that evolves from 1 of their Basic Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. If that Pokémon was evolved in this way, that player may search their deck for a Stage 2 Pokémon that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, that player shuffles their deck. (Players can’t evolve a Basic Pokémon during their first turn or a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.)

skills.name: Area Zero Underdepths
skills.text:
Each player who has any Tera Pokémon in play can have up to 8 Pokémon on their Bench.

If a player no longer has any Tera Pokémon in play, that player discards Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5. When this card leaves play, both players discard Pokémon from their Bench until they have 5, and the player who played this card discards first.

skills.name: Lively Stadium
skills.text: Each Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) gets +30 HP.

skills.name: Gravity Mountain
skills.text: Each Stage 2 Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) gets -30 HP.

skills.name: N’s Castle
skills.text: N’s Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) have no Retreat Cost.

skills.name: Levincia
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may put up to 2 Basic {L} Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.

skills.name: Postwick
skills.text: Attacks used by Hop’s Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) do 30 more damage to the opponent’s Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Team Rocket's Watchtower
skills.text: {C} Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) have no Abilities.

skills.name: Team Rocket's Factory
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, if they played a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name from their hand this turn, they may draw 2 cards.

skills.name: Granite Cave
skills.text: Steven’s Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) take 30 less damage from attacks from the opponent’s Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

skills.name: Spikemuth Gym
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may search their deck for a Marnie’s Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into their hand. Then, that player shuffles their deck.

skills.name: Risky Ruins
skills.text: Whenever any player puts a Basic non-{D} Pokémon onto their Bench during their turn, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

skills.name: Forest of Vitality
skills.text: Each player’s {G} Pokémon can evolve into {G} Pokémon during the turn they play those Pokémon, except during their first turn.

skills.name: Surfing Beach
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may switch their Active {W} Pokémon with 1 of their Benched {W} Pokémon.

skills.name: Mystery Garden
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may discard an Energy card from their hand in order to draw cards until they have as many cards in their hand as they have {P} Pokémon in play.

skills.name: Battle Cage
skills.text: Prevent all damage counters from being placed on Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) by effects of attacks and Abilities from the opponent’s Pokémon. (Damage from attacks is still taken.)

skills.name: Dizzying Valley
skills.text: Confused Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) don’t recover from that Special Condition when they evolve or devolve.

skills.name: Nighttime Mine
skills.text: Attacks used by each Tera Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent’s) cost {C} more.

skills.name: Lumiose City
skills.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may search their deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto their Bench. Then, that player shuffles their deck. If a player searches their deck in this way, their turn ends.
